title: P'w'eck Emancipation Movement
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''P'w'eck Emancipation Movement''' was a faction that moved to liberate the [[P'w'eck]] from the [[Ssi-ruu]]k.

==History==
During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] investigated [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]] on a tip from the [[Ryn Network]]. Upon arriving, they found that the P'w'eck had apparently defected from their Ssi-ruuk masters because of the birth of the [[Keeramak]], a Ssi-Ruu blessed with all the colors of the species. The P'w'eck claimed to have formed the P'w'eck Emancipation Movement and had allied with the Bakurans.<ref name="NJO">''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]''</ref>

Later, the entire act was proved to be an elaborate plan to take over Bakura, as the P'w'eck revolt had actually been engineered by the Ssi-ruuk. Although the original movement was a ploy, [[Lwothin]], the advance leader of the P'w'ecks, took the opportunity and fired upon the Ssi-ruuk, killing the Keeremak and saving Han and Leia's lives. This turned the tide of the [[Battle of Bakura (28 ABY)|battle]] in favor of the Bakurans and the Galactic Alliance. Thus, the [[Ssi-ruuvi invasions]] was stopped dead in its tracks.<ref name="NJO" />

Following the battle, P'w'eck Emancipation Movement signed a formal treaty with the Bakuran government which formed an alliance between the two peoples. Some of the terms of the treaty included holding elections in a month, sharing all captured Ssi-ruuvi assets and supporting a liberation struggle for the P'w'ecks in the Imperium. The former [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] predicted that there would be an influx of P'w'eck refugees from the Imperium within months and a possible Ssi-ruuvi invasion within a year.<ref name="NJO" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]'' {{1st}}
